notices.label: ARCHITECTURAL NOTE: VTO_EDITORIAL is a DEAD CODE PATH — buildVTOEditorialPrompt() and its two-image parts builder are never called by classify()
notices.detail: Intentional design: VTO_BACKGROUND_REPLACE replaced VTO_EDITORIAL as the primary path. VTO_EDITORIAL code is kept for reference but could be removed.
